Scars.Name: Disrupted Targeting
Scars.Description: -1 to all Attack Actions (A roll of 6 always hits)

Scars.Name: Fractured Core
Scars.Description: -1 to the models HEAT Limit (to a minimum Heat Limit 3.)

Scars.Name: Hamstring
Scars.Description: The model has -1 Speed (to a minimum of 1).

Scars.Name: Damaged
Scars.Description: Reduce the models total PFs by 1 (minimum of 1).

Scars.Name: Weapon Destroyed
Scars.Description: model adds +1 to all HEAT checks.
